narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: White Garcetti was away, Los Angeles continued to struggle with the high crime and homelessness that have come to define his legacy, as well as a crisis in the City Council triggered by racist comments from City Council members within Garcetti’s party.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement challenges the competence and priorities of Mayor Garcetti and his administration by contrasting his international trip with domestic crises, thereby questioning his integrity and effectiveness as a leader.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: It is not clear why the conference could not be held remotely.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: CC: Criticism of institutions and authorities
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: though L.A.’s infrastructure is not widely considered “high-quality.” A proposed high-speed rail between L.A. and San Francisco has been largely canceled, and current passenger rail service from L.A. to San Diego has been suspended because of a potential landslide hazard.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote challenges the competence and effectiveness of the mayor and his administration by highlighting failures in local infrastructure and transportation projects, undermining their authority on climate and urban issues.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Garcetti’s “Green New Deal” calls for shuttering natural gas plants; it has been opposed by public works unions, and lost the only serious electoral challenge it faced in a 2019 city council race.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement criticizes a specific climate policy initiative by pointing to opposition and electoral failure, thereby challenging the viability and support for the climate movement's proposals.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: Garcetti’s “Green New Deal” calls for shuttering natural gas plants; it has been opposed by public works unions
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The quote highlights opposition from unions to the policy of closing natural gas plants, introducing controversy and skepticism about the implementation and consequences of transitioning to greener energy sources.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: CC: Criticism of institutions and authorities
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: White Garcetti was away, Los Angeles continued to struggle with the high crime and homelessness that have come to define his legacy, as well as a crisis in the City Council triggered by racist comments from City Council members within Garcetti’s party.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This quote criticizes Mayor Garcetti's competence and priorities by highlighting domestic crises (crime, homelessness, political scandal) that persisted or worsened while he was focused on an international climate event, thereby challenging his effectiveness and integrity as an authority figure.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: It is not clear why the conference could not be held remotely.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: This statement implicitly criticizes the climate movement's practices by suggesting hypocrisy or inefficiency, questioning why a group dedicated to reducing emissions would choose a carbon-intensive in-person meeting format, thereby challenging the movement's operational integrity.
